# Extração: 03-Mapping Emotions

- **Fonte:** 03-Mapping Emotions.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF

---

Storytellers seek to manipulate their audience's emotions.
In order to do this effectively, a storyteller must map out the desired emotions of
the audience at every step of the journey.
This lesson will show you how.
